description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular plastic toolbox with a two-tone color scheme: a light gray lid and a black base. The lid features a large, central, folding handle made of dark gray plastic, designed for easy carrying. On the front, there is a prominent beige plastic latch mechanism for securing the lid, and two visible brand logos on the front and side. The box appears to have reinforced corners and molded details for added durability. The overall design suggests a single main compartment inside, possibly with a removable tray, though no internal dividers are visible. The exterior is smooth with some matte and slightly textured surfaces for grip.
description: A sturdy, two-tone plastic toolbox with a folding handle, front latch, and visible brand logos. The design is practical and durable, suitable for carrying tools.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige latch, folding handle, and two brand logos on the front and side.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the latch, handle, and side logo, with more detail on the lid's molded features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the toolbox, handle, and the absence of latches or logos.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the back and side, with the handle and lid contours visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single large folding handle, rectangular, made of hard plastic with a slightly textured grip for ergonomics.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front clasp latch made of beige plastic, snap-type, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: Brand logos are visible on the front right and left side of the toolbox, rectangular with yellow and white text and symbols.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single main compartment implied, possibly with a removable tray inside; no external drawers or bins visible.
attribute_external_labeling: Front right: rectangular brand logo with yellow and white text
Left side: rectangular brand logo with yellow and white text
